name: MICA MINI - Indoor Air Quality Sensor
description: MICA Mini is a compact indoor air quality sensor with LoRaWAN, Wi-Fi, NB-IoT/LTE-M and Sigfox connectivity, measuring temperature, relative humidity and CO₂, and providing thermohygrometric comfort, ventilation efficiency and resistance to mold growth indicators, with optional noise monitoring and integration with building management systems via Modbus and BACnet.
author: inBiot
